/**
 * mps._adexecuteCallback
 * created 05/10/2019 ken.brocx@nbcuni.com ruben.rajkowski@nbcuni.com
 * Fallback for normal HB execution is delayed or skipped
 * @param {string} slot
 * @param {number} loadset
 * @return {boolean}
 * @private
 */
mps._adexecuteCallback = function(slot, loadset) {
  if (!mps._bool(mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload) && typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function") {
    mps._reqs.hb = mps._reqs.hb || {};
    mps.hb._executedads = mps.hb._executedads || {};
    if (!mps.hb.loadedads) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] WAIT: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed('', true));
      return false;
    }
    var adobj = gpt[mps._advars[loadset][slot]];
    if (mps.hb._executedads[loadset] && mps.hb._executedads[loadset].indexOf(slot) > -1) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] SKIP: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed());
      return false;
    }
    var exclude = adobj !== null && adobj.getCategoryExclusions() || [];
    if (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1) {
      mps.hb.excluded.push(slot);
      mps._d('^[mps:hb:ae] EXCLUDED "!c=headerbid": ' + slot);
    } else {
      if( mps.hb.mgid && pbjs && pbjs.libLoaded) {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:mg] CALL MG: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        pbjs.que.push(function() {
					pbjs.rp.requestBids({
              gptSlotObjects: [adobj],
              callback: mps.hb.requestPreBidsCallback
					});
			  });
      }
    }
    // Refreshes ads that are late rendered
   
    mps._queue.gptloaded.push(function() {
      setTimeout(function() {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] CALL: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        mps._reqs.hb['adcall-' + loadset + '-' + slot] = mps._elapsed('', true);
        if( !mps.hb.mgid || (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1)) {
          mps.hb._gptrefreshes.adexecute.push(adobj.getSlotElementId());
          
            googletag.pubads().refresh([adobj], {
              changeCorrelator: false
            });
          
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset] = mps.hb._executedads[loadset] || [];
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset].push(slot);
        }
      }, 50);
    });
  }
};</script><script>if(typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function"){mps.hb.execute();}else{mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload = 1;}</script><script>

mps._scaleAd = function (adslot,forceratio) {
  mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Called Custom mps._scaleAd: '+adslot);
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]);
  var _viewport = mps._viewport();
  var adwidth = aiframe.clientWidth;
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] INITIAL AD WIDTH: ',adwidth)
  // Get width from adload if no iframe width
  if(!aiframe.clientWidth && mps._adloads && mps._adloads[mps._loadset] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0]) {
    adwidth = mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0];
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] NEW AD WIDTH: ',mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0])
  }
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] VIEWPORT WIDTH: '+_viewport)
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && _viewport[0] < adwidth) {
    var vpwidth = _viewport[0],
      sideoffset = Math.floor(aiframe.offsetLeft),
      scaleratio = typeof(forceratio)!='number' ? (vpwidth / (adwidth + sideoffset * 2)) : forceratio,
      scaleratioh = typeof(forceratio)!='number' ? (vpwidth / adwidth) : forceratio,
      scaledwidth = Math.floor(adwidth * scaleratio),
      scaledheight = Math.floor(aiframe.clientHeight * scaleratioh);
    mps.__prescalestate = mps.__prescalestate || {};
    if(mps._classHas(adivgpt,scaleclass)) mps._scaleAdRevert(adslot);
    mps.__prescalestate[adslot] = { 'div':adivgpt.getAttribute('style'), 'iframe':aiframe.getAttribute('style') }
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',
      'zoom: 1;'+
      'scale:'+scaleratio+';'+
      '-moz-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-moz-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      '-o-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-o-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      '-webkit-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-webkit-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      'transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      'transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      'border: 0');
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',
      ((scaleratio < 1) ? 'overflow: hidden;' : '')+
      'margin: 0 auto;'+
      'padding: 0;'+
      'height:'+scaledheight+'px;'+
      'width:'+scaledwidth+'px;');
    aiframe.setAttribute('data-scale',scaleratio);
    mps._classAdd(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Viewport Width: '+vpwidth+'px | Left Offset: '+sideoffset+'px | Right Offset: '+(vpwidth-(scaledwidth+sideoffset))+'px | Iframe Width: '+adwidth+'px | Scale Ratio (w): '+scaleratio+' | Scale Ratio (h): '+scaleratioh+' | Scaled Ad (w): '+scaledwidth+'px | Scaled Ad (h): '+scaledheight+'px '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    if(mps._classHas(adivgpt,scaleclass)) mps._scaleAdRevert(adslot);
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Bypass /'+adslot+'/ '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}

mps._scaleAdRevert = function(adslot) {
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]),
    _viewport = mps._viewport && mps._viewport();
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate)=='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate[adslot])=='object') {
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].iframe);
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].div);
    delete mps.__prescalestate[adslot];
    mps._classRemove(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscaled '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscale FAILED '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}
</script>

<script>
mps.refreshAdsInterval = function (slotname,intervalkey) {
  if(slotname === false) {
    return false;
  }
  intervalsecs = 30;
  mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window has focus, refresh ads. : "+ slotname);
  mps.refreshintervals = mps.refreshintervals || {};
  var intervalkey = intervalkey || (mps._keys(mps.refreshintervals).length + 1);
  if(intervalsecs > 0) {
    mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Set ad refresh interval for '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
    mps.refreshintervals[intervalkey] = setInterval(function(){
      mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Reached '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) interval - Refreshing ad slots [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
      // Detected display active refresh enabled.
      if(mps._bool(mpsopts.activerefresh) === true || mpsopts.activerefresh > 0) {
        // Check if window has focus.
        if(mps._activerefresh._focus === true ) {
            mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad. adslots is : "+ slotname +" : "+ mps._advars[mps._loadset][slotname]);
            var adelem = '#'+mps._adslots[mps._loadset][slotname];
            if( mps.inViewport(adelem,false) ) {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad IS in view. "+ slotname);
                mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
            } else {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad NOT in view. "+ slotname);
            }
        } else {
          mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window doesn't have focus, or ad not in viewport, don't refresh ads.");
        }
      } else {
        mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
      }
    }, intervalsecs*1000);
    return intervalkey;
  }
};
</script>

<script>
/**
 * mps._adexecuteCallback
 * created 05/10/2019 ken.brocx@nbcuni.com ruben.rajkowski@nbcuni.com
 * Fallback for normal HB execution is delayed or skipped
 * @param {string} slot
 * @param {number} loadset
 * @return {boolean}
 * @private
 */
mps._adexecuteCallback = function(slot, loadset) {
  if (!mps._bool(mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload) && typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function") {
    mps._reqs.hb = mps._reqs.hb || {};
    mps.hb._executedads = mps.hb._executedads || {};
    if (!mps.hb.loadedads) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] WAIT: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed('', true));
      return false;
    }
    var adobj = gpt[mps._advars[loadset][slot]];
    if (mps.hb._executedads[loadset] && mps.hb._executedads[loadset].indexOf(slot) > -1) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] SKIP: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed());
      return false;
    }
    var exclude = adobj !== null && adobj.getCategoryExclusions() || [];
    if (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1) {
      mps.hb.excluded.push(slot);
      mps._d('^[mps:hb:ae] EXCLUDED "!c=headerbid": ' + slot);
    } else {
      if( mps.hb.mgid && pbjs && pbjs.libLoaded) {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:mg] CALL MG: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        pbjs.que.push(function() {
					pbjs.rp.requestBids({
              gptSlotObjects: [adobj],
              callback: mps.hb.requestPreBidsCallback
					});
			  });
      }
    }
    // Refreshes ads that are late rendered
   
    mps._queue.gptloaded.push(function() {
      setTimeout(function() {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] CALL: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        mps._reqs.hb['adcall-' + loadset + '-' + slot] = mps._elapsed('', true);
        if( !mps.hb.mgid || (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1)) {
          mps.hb._gptrefreshes.adexecute.push(adobj.getSlotElementId());
          
            googletag.pubads().refresh([adobj], {
              changeCorrelator: false
            });
          
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset] = mps.hb._executedads[loadset] || [];
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset].push(slot);
        }
      }, 50);
    });
  }
};</script><script>if(typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function"){mps.hb.execute();}else{mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload = 1;}</script><script>

<script>// Fandango Redesign Responsive Adhesive Ads
mps.__setResponsiveAds = function() {
  ADHESIVESLOT='boxaddt'; ADHESIVESLOTB='boxadone'; ADHESIVESLOTC='boxad'; ADHESIVEBREAK='tablet'; ADHESIVECLASS='ad-adhesive';

  if(typeof(mps)=='object' && typeof(mps.responsiveslots)=='object' && typeof(mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset])=='object' && typeof(mps._ready)=='function' && typeof(mps.selectAd)=='function' && typeof(mps.getResponsiveSet)=='function' && typeof(mps.slotsdisabled)=='object') {
      mps._ready(function() {
        var armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];
        var aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
        if(aslot==false && typeof(ADHESIVESLOTB)=='string') {
          ADHESIVESLOT = ADHESIVESLOTB;
          armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];

        }
        if(aslot==false && (mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOTB))==false && typeof(ADHESIVESLOTC)=='string') {
          ADHESIVESLOT = ADHESIVESLOTC;
          armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];
          aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
        }
        if(aslot && mps.getResponsiveSet()=='tablet' && typeof(armap)=='object' && typeof(mps.slotsdisabled['boxaddt'])=='undefined') {
          if(typeof(aslot)=='object') { // Everything looks good
            debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:component:Responsive] Applying adhesive class to '+ADHESIVESLOT+' ('+ADHESIVECLASS+')');
            mps._classAdd(aslot,ADHESIVECLASS);
            // close button
            var closeButton = document.createElement('i');
            var adIframeWidth = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(aslot.querySelector('iframe')).width);
            closeButton.className = 'icon icon-close mps-close';
            closeButton.style.cssText = 'display: block; margin-right: -' + (adIframeWidth / 2 + 12) + 'px;';
            aslot.insertBefore(closeButton, aslot.firstChild);
            closeButton.addEventListener('click', function(){
              closeButton.closest('.ad-adhesive').style.display = 'none';
            });
            // close button
            typeof(mps._elapsed)=='function' && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:component:Responsive] EXECUTED __setResponsiveAds ('+ADHESIVEBREAK+') '+ADHESIVESLOT+' .'+ADHESIVECLASS+' '+mps._elapsed());
          }
        } else {
          var aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
          if(typeof(aslot)=='object') {
            mps._classRemove(aslot,ADHESIVECLASS);
          }
        }
      });
      return true;
  } else {
    debugmode.log && console.log ('[mps:component:Responsive] Responsive not enabled or MPS not fully loaded.');
    return false;
  }
};
mps.__setResponsiveAds();

mps._scaleAd = function (adslot,forceratio) {
  mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Called Custom mps._scaleAd: '+adslot);
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]);
  var _viewport = mps._viewport();
  var adwidth = aiframe.clientWidth;
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] INITIAL AD WIDTH: ',adwidth)
  // Get width from adload if no iframe width
  if(!aiframe.clientWidth && mps._adloads && mps._adloads[mps._loadset] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0]) {

  }
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] VIEWPORT WIDTH: '+_viewport)
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && _viewport[0] < adwidth) {

  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate)=='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate[adslot])=='object') {
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].iframe);
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].div);
    delete mps.__prescalestate[adslot];
    mps._classRemove(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscaled '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscale FAILED '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}
</script>


<!--{@bodyheader} fandango-floodlight2-core-ccpa: Fandango Floodlight2 Handler (gtag) (ccpa)-->
<script>//--[2020-08-18] New Fandango Floodlight Execution (gtag)
if((typeof OptanonActiveGroups !== 'undefined') || (mps._ck && mps._ck.r('OptanonConsent'))){ 
	var OptanonActiveGroups = OptanonActiveGroups || '';
	window.console && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] OptanonActiveGroups loaded FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO'); 
	
	//reformat cmpid for cookies group format
	let cmp_id = ',USP,';
	let cmp_id_num = cmp_id.replace(/,/g, '');
	let optanonCookie = mps._ck.r('OptanonConsent') || '';
	let cmpRegex = 'groups=[^&]*%2C'+cmp_id_num+'%3A1';
	
	if(OptanonActiveGroups.match(cmp_id ) || optanonCookie.match(cmpRegex)){


      mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=loaded-core');
      /* @TODO support app - times */
      mps.fandango=mps.fandango||{};
      mps.fandango.fltags=mps.fandango.fltags||[];
      mps.fandango.addFloodlight2 = function(targettype, platform, mvid, flsendto) {

        mps._d('[mps:FL2] addFloodlight2 called: ' + targettype + ' : ' + platform + ' : ' + mvid + ' : ' + flsendto);

        //TEST IF FLOODLIGHT SHOULD FIRE ON PAGE
        var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
        var pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
        var pathsforfloodlight = ['movie-times','movie-overview','TicketOrderConfirmationPage.aspx', 'UserConfirmation.aspx'];
        if(pathsforfloodlight.indexOf(pagemvid) == -1){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight not found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight was found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
        }

        // STANDARDIZE VALUES
        if(!targettype || !platform || !mvid || !flsendto) return false;
        if(targettype.indexOf('ticket')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('conf')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('tc')>-1) targettype = 'ticket';
        if(targettype.indexOf('movie')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('overview')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('mop')>-1) targettype = 'movie';
        if(targettype.indexOf('time')>-1) targettype = 'times';
        if(platform=='app' && targettype=='ticket') return false;
        // DETERMINE PLATFORM THEN CHECK 
        if(platform.indexOf('app')>-1) platform='app';
        if(platform.indexOf('desktop')>-1 || platform=='web'  || platform=='dweb') platform = 'dweb';
        if(platform.indexOf('mobile')>-1 || platform=='mweb') platform = 'mweb';
        if(platform=='dweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-web') return false;
        if(platform=='mweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-mobile') return false;
        if(platform=='app' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-apps') return false
        // DETERMINE PAGE TYPE THEN CHECK 
        var pagetype;
        if(typeof(mps.pagevars.cats)!='object') return false;
        if(mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('movie_detail')>-1 || mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('moviepage')>-1 || JSON.stringify(mps.pagevars.cats)=='["androidmovies","detail"]') pagetype='movie';
        if(mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase_confirmation' || mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase') pagetype = 'ticket';
        if(mps.pagevars.type=='movielisting' || mps.pagevars.type=='msp') pagetype = 'times';
        if(!pagetype || targettype!=pagetype) {
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pagetype targettype match: ' + pagetype + ' : ' + targettype);
        }
        // DETERMINE PAGE MV ID THEN CHECK 
        var pagemvid;
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.movieid) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.movieid[0];
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.mv) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.mv[0];
        if(!pagemvid && mps.pagevars.instance=='fandango-apps' && mps.pagevars.path.indexOf('movies/detail')>-1) {
          var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
          if(/^\d+$/.test(pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1])) {
            pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
          }
        }
        if(!pagemvid || mvid!=pagemvid){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid nomatch: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid match: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
        }
        mps._l('[mps:FL2] Adding floodlight tag ('+targettype+', '+platform+', '+mvid+') '+flsendto)
        return mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2(flsendto);
      }
      mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2 = function(sendto,dcmflid) {
        mps._d('[mps:FL2] executeFloodlight2 called: ' + sendto + ' : ' + dcmflid );
        mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=call-executeFloodlight2');
        if(typeof(sendto)!='string') return false;
        if(!dcmflid) var dcmflid = sendto.split('/')[0];
        if(!mps.fandango._gtagload) {
          var gtagurl = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id='+dcmflid;
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] Loading Script '+gtagurl);
          mps._append('body','<scr'+'ipt async src="'+gtagurl+'"></scr'+'ipt><scr'+'ipt>window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[];function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments)}gtag("js",new Date);</scr'+'ipt>');
          mps.fandango._gtagload = 1;
        }
        mps._d('[mps:FL2] DCM Floodlight Config ID: '+dcmflid+' - Send To: '+sendto);
        gtag('config',dcmflid);
        gtag('event','conversion',{
          'allow_custom_scripts': true,
          'send_to': sendto
        });
        mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=gtag-event');
        return true;
      }
      mps._d('[mps:FL2] Handler Core Loaded');
    console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] component loads FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO'); 
	} else { 
		console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] component doesnt load no match FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO ' + cmp_id); 
	}
	
	} else {
	
	window.console && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] OptanonActiveGroups not loaded FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO');
	
	}
</script>

<!--{@bodyfooter}adRefresh30: adRefresh30-->
<script>
mps.refreshAdsInterval = function (slotname,intervalkey) {
  if(slotname === false) {
    return false;
  }
  intervalsecs = 30;
  mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window has focus, refresh ads. : "+ slotname);
  mps.refreshintervals = mps.refreshintervals || {};
  var intervalkey = intervalkey || (mps._keys(mps.refreshintervals).length + 1);
  if(intervalsecs > 0) {
    mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Set ad refresh interval for '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
    mps.refreshintervals[intervalkey] = setInterval(function(){
      mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Reached '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) interval - Refreshing ad slots [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
      // Detected display active refresh enabled.
      if(mps._bool(mpsopts.activerefresh) === true || mpsopts.activerefresh > 0) {
        // Check if window has focus.
        if(mps._activerefresh._focus === true ) {
            mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad. adslots is : "+ slotname +" : "+ mps._advars[mps._loadset][slotname]);
            var adelem = '#'+mps._adslots[mps._loadset][slotname];
            if( mps.inViewport(adelem,false) ) {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad IS in view. "+ slotname);
                mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
            } else {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad NOT in view. "+ slotname);
            }
        } else {
          mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window doesn't have focus, or ad not in viewport, don't refresh ads.");
        }
      } else {
        mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
      }
    }, intervalsecs*1000);
    return intervalkey;
  }
};
</script>
<script>
mps._refreshslots = ['boxaddt'];
if( typeof(mps.refreshAdsInterval) == 'function' ){
    mps._refreshslots.forEach(mps.refreshAdsInterval);
}else{
    window.console && console.log('[mps:refresh:component] refreshAdsInterval not function '+ mps._refreshslots.toString());
}
</script>
<script>typeof mps._postscribe == "object" && mps._postscribe.disable();</script>

DomainData.MainText: Notice of Right to Opt-Out of Sale/Sharing and Targeted Advertising
DomainData.MainInfoText:
We may collect personal data from and about you through this site for “targeted advertising,” “selling,” or “sharing,” as defined by applicable privacy laws. Some states provide residents (or their authorized agents) with the right to opt out of these practices. See the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy for more info.

If you reside in one of these states (or are an authorized agent) you can opt out of targeted advertising, selling, or sharing, occurring on this site by moving the toggle below to the left and clicking “Confirm My Choice.” Your choice through the toggle is specific to this site. If you access other Versant sites and services, you will need to opt out for each. Also, if you clear your cookies on this browser or use another browser or device, you will need to opt out again. You can change your choice any time.

In addition to the toggle, you should also provide the information requested in our “Opt-Out Form” (accessible by clicking the “+” below), which will enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just on this site (e.g., we will be able to stop sharing your email with third parties in order to target you with adverting on other site and services, such as social media platforms).

You may also enable where available and provided for under applicable privacy laws, a universal tool that automatically communicates your opt out preference, such as the Global Privacy Control (“GPC”). If detected, we will process your GPC signal as if you had opted out through the toggle.

If you opt-out, you may continue to see advertising, including ads that may be based on personal information processed before you opted out.
DomainData.AlertNoticeText:
This site is now part of Versant. By continuing, you agree to our Terms. You also acknowledge that our updated Privacy Policy applies, including your existing data. For info on your data rights, click “Your Privacy Choices” or see “Your Rights” in our Privacy Policy.

We and our partners also use tools on this site to provide the services, personalize your experience, and for analytics, marketing, and advertising. If you previously opted out of selling, sharing, or targeted advertising on this site, you will need to update your Privacy Choice.

Those cookies are set by us and called first-party cookies. We also use third-party cookies – which are cookies from a domain different than the domain of the website you are visiting – for our advertising and marketing efforts. More specifically, we use cookies and other tracking technologies for the following purposes:

DomainData.PCOptOutSignalText:
Residents (or authorized agents) of states listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy: You are opted out of targeted advertising, selling, or sharing, occurring on this site, for this browser and device. We received your election through our toggle or a universal opt-out preference signal. You can change your choice any time.
You should also provide the information requested in this Opt-Out Form, which will enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just this site (e.g., we will be able to stop sharing your email with third parties in order to target you with adverting on other sites and services, like social media platforms, such as social media platforms).
Residents (or authorized agents) of states not listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy: If we do not detect that you are in one of the states listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy, we cannot ensure that we will be able to apply your opt out choice, even if you utilize the toggle or we receive your election through your universal opt-out preference signal.
DomainData.PCOptOutSignalTextAfterConsent: Your Opt Out Preference Signal Was Honored

<script>
/**
 * mps._adexecuteCallback
 * created 05/10/2019 ken.brocx@nbcuni.com ruben.rajkowski@nbcuni.com
 * Fallback for normal HB execution is delayed or skipped
 * @param {string} slot
 * @param {number} loadset
 * @return {boolean}
 * @private
 */
mps._adexecuteCallback = function(slot, loadset) {
  if (!mps._bool(mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload) && typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function") {
    mps._reqs.hb = mps._reqs.hb || {};
    mps.hb._executedads = mps.hb._executedads || {};
    if (!mps.hb.loadedads) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] WAIT: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed('', true));
      return false;
    }
    var adobj = gpt[mps._advars[loadset][slot]];
    if (mps.hb._executedads[loadset] && mps.hb._executedads[loadset].indexOf(slot) > -1) {
      mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] SKIP: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback)' + mps._elapsed());
      return false;
    }
    var exclude = adobj !== null && adobj.getCategoryExclusions() || [];
    if (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1) {
      mps.hb.excluded.push(slot);
      mps._d('^[mps:hb:ae] EXCLUDED "!c=headerbid": ' + slot);
    } else {
      if( mps.hb.mgid && pbjs && pbjs.libLoaded) {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:mg] CALL MG: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        pbjs.que.push(function() {
					pbjs.rp.requestBids({
              gptSlotObjects: [adobj],
              callback: mps.hb.requestPreBidsCallback
					});
			  });
      }
    }
    // Refreshes ads that are late rendered
   
    mps._queue.gptloaded.push(function() {
      setTimeout(function() {
        mps._d('[mps:hb:ae] CALL: ' + loadset + '/' + slot + ' (adexecuteCallback) ' + mps._elapsed());
        mps._reqs.hb['adcall-' + loadset + '-' + slot] = mps._elapsed('', true);
        if( !mps.hb.mgid || (exclude && exclude.indexOf('headerbid') > -1)) {
          mps.hb._gptrefreshes.adexecute.push(adobj.getSlotElementId());
          
            googletag.pubads().refresh([adobj], {
              changeCorrelator: false
            });
          
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset] = mps.hb._executedads[loadset] || [];
          mps.hb._executedads[loadset].push(slot);
        }
      }, 50);
    });
  }
};</script><script>if(typeof mps.hb == "object" && typeof mps.hb.execute == "function"){mps.hb.execute();}else{mpsopts.skipdisableinitialload = 1;}</script><script>

<script>// Fandango Ad Scaling [2015-12-21]
mps.fandango=mps.fandango||{};
mps.fandango.initialvp = mps._viewport();
mps._d('****[mps:SCALING] INITIAL VIEWPORT WIDTH: '+mps.fandango.initialvp[0]);

//--Fishtank Ad Scaling for Detected Display
mps._queue.adload.push(function(eo) {
  if(typeof(eo)=='object' && eo._mps && eo._mps._slot) {
    if(eo._mps._slot=='topbanner') {
      mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Ad Load Callback Top Banner: Triggering');
      mps._scaleAd('topbanner');
    }
    if(eo._mps._slot=='fishtank') {
      mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Ad Load Callback Fishtank: Triggering');
      mps._scaleAd('fishtank');
    }
  }
});

mps._scaleAd = function (adslot,forceratio) {
  mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Called Custom mps._scaleAd: '+adslot);
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]);
  var _viewport = mps._viewport();
  var adwidth = aiframe.clientWidth;
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] INITIAL AD WIDTH: ',adwidth)
  // Get width from adload if no iframe width
  if(!aiframe.clientWidth && mps._adloads && mps._adloads[mps._loadset] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0]) {
    adwidth = mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0];
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] NEW AD WIDTH: ',mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0])
  }
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] VIEWPORT WIDTH: '+_viewport)
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && _viewport[0] < adwidth) {
    var vpwidth = _viewport[0],
      sideoffset = Math.floor(aiframe.offsetLeft),
      scaleratio = typeof(forceratio)!='number' ? (vpwidth / (adwidth + sideoffset * 2)) : forceratio,
      scaleratioh = typeof(forceratio)!='number' ? (vpwidth / adwidth) : forceratio,
      scaledwidth = Math.floor(adwidth * scaleratio),
      scaledheight = Math.floor(aiframe.clientHeight * scaleratioh);
    mps.__prescalestate = mps.__prescalestate || {};
    if(mps._classHas(adivgpt,scaleclass)) mps._scaleAdRevert(adslot);
    mps.__prescalestate[adslot] = { 'div':adivgpt.getAttribute('style'), 'iframe':aiframe.getAttribute('style') }
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',
      'zoom: 1;'+
      'scale:'+scaleratio+';'+
      '-moz-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-moz-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      '-o-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-o-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      '-webkit-transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      '-webkit-transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      'transform-origin: 0 0;'+
      'transform: scale('+scaleratio+');'+
      'border: 0');
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',
      ((scaleratio < 1) ? 'overflow: hidden;' : '')+
      'margin: 0 auto;'+
      'padding: 0;'+
      'height:'+scaledheight+'px;'+
      'width:'+scaledwidth+'px;');
    aiframe.setAttribute('data-scale',scaleratio);
    mps._classAdd(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Viewport Width: '+vpwidth+'px | Left Offset: '+sideoffset+'px | Right Offset: '+(vpwidth-(scaledwidth+sideoffset))+'px | Iframe Width: '+adwidth+'px | Scale Ratio (w): '+scaleratio+' | Scale Ratio (h): '+scaleratioh+' | Scaled Ad (w): '+scaledwidth+'px | Scaled Ad (h): '+scaledheight+'px '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    if(mps._classHas(adivgpt,scaleclass)) mps._scaleAdRevert(adslot);
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Bypass /'+adslot+'/ '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}

mps._scaleAdRevert = function(adslot) {
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]),
    _viewport = mps._viewport && mps._viewport();
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate)=='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate[adslot])=='object') {
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].iframe);
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].div);
    delete mps.__prescalestate[adslot];
    mps._classRemove(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscaled '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscale FAILED '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}
</script>

      mps.fandango.addFloodlight2 = function(targettype, platform, mvid, flsendto) {

        mps._d('[mps:FL2] addFloodlight2 called: ' + targettype + ' : ' + platform + ' : ' + mvid + ' : ' + flsendto);

        //TEST IF FLOODLIGHT SHOULD FIRE ON PAGE
        var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
        var pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
        var pathsforfloodlight = ['movie-times','movie-overview','TicketOrderConfirmationPage.aspx', 'UserConfirmation.aspx'];
        if(pathsforfloodlight.indexOf(pagemvid) == -1){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight not found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight was found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
        }

        // STANDARDIZE VALUES
        if(!targettype || !platform || !mvid || !flsendto) return false;
        if(targettype.indexOf('ticket')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('conf')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('tc')>-1) targettype = 'ticket';
        if(targettype.indexOf('movie')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('overview')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('mop')>-1) targettype = 'movie';
        if(targettype.indexOf('time')>-1) targettype = 'times';
        if(platform=='app' && targettype=='ticket') return false;
        // DETERMINE PLATFORM THEN CHECK 
        if(platform.indexOf('app')>-1) platform='app';
        if(platform.indexOf('desktop')>-1 || platform=='web'  || platform=='dweb') platform = 'dweb';
        if(platform.indexOf('mobile')>-1 || platform=='mweb') platform = 'mweb';
        if(platform=='dweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-web') return false;
        if(platform=='mweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-mobile') return false;
        if(platform=='app' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-apps') return false
        // DETERMINE PAGE TYPE THEN CHECK 
        var pagetype;
        if(typeof(mps.pagevars.cats)!='object') return false;
        if(mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('movie_detail')>-1 || mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('moviepage')>-1 || JSON.stringify(mps.pagevars.cats)=='["androidmovies","detail"]') pagetype='movie';
        if(mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase_confirmation' || mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase') pagetype = 'ticket';
        if(mps.pagevars.type=='movielisting' || mps.pagevars.type=='msp') pagetype = 'times';
        if(!pagetype || targettype!=pagetype) {
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pagetype targettype match: ' + pagetype + ' : ' + targettype);
        }
        // DETERMINE PAGE MV ID THEN CHECK 
        var pagemvid;
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.movieid) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.movieid[0];
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.mv) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.mv[0];
        if(!pagemvid && mps.pagevars.instance=='fandango-apps' && mps.pagevars.path.indexOf('movies/detail')>-1) {
          var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
          if(/^\d+$/.test(pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1])) {
            pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
          }
        }
        if(!pagemvid || mvid!=pagemvid){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid nomatch: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid match: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
        }
        mps._l('[mps:FL2] Adding floodlight tag ('+targettype+', '+platform+', '+mvid+') '+flsendto)
        return mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2(flsendto);
      }
      mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2 = function(sendto,dcmflid) {
        mps._d('[mps:FL2] executeFloodlight2 called: ' + sendto + ' : ' + dcmflid );
        mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=call-executeFloodlight2');
        if(typeof(sendto)!='string') return false;
        if(!dcmflid) var dcmflid = sendto.split('/')[0];
        if(!mps.fandango._gtagload) {
          var gtagurl = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id='+dcmflid;
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] Loading Script '+gtagurl);
          mps._append('body','<scr'+'ipt async src="'+gtagurl+'"></scr'+'ipt><scr'+'ipt>window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[];function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments)}gtag("js",new Date);</scr'+'ipt>');

    console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] component loads FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO');

<script>
mps.refreshAdsInterval = function (slotname,intervalkey) {
  if(slotname === false) {
    return false;
  }
  intervalsecs = 30;
  mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window has focus, refresh ads. : "+ slotname);
  mps.refreshintervals = mps.refreshintervals || {};
  var intervalkey = intervalkey || (mps._keys(mps.refreshintervals).length + 1);
  if(intervalsecs > 0) {
    mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Set ad refresh interval for '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
    mps.refreshintervals[intervalkey] = setInterval(function(){
      mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Reached '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) interval - Refreshing ad slots [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
      // Detected display active refresh enabled.
      if(mps._bool(mpsopts.activerefresh) === true || mpsopts.activerefresh > 0) {
        // Check if window has focus.
        if(mps._activerefresh._focus === true ) {
            mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad. adslots is : "+ slotname +" : "+ mps._advars[mps._loadset][slotname]);
            var adelem = '#'+mps._adslots[mps._loadset][slotname];
            if( mps.inViewport(adelem,false) ) {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad IS in view. "+ slotname);
                mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
            } else {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad NOT in view. "+ slotname);
            }
        } else {
          mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window doesn't have focus, or ad not in viewport, don't refresh ads.");
        }
      } else {
        mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
      }
    }, intervalsecs*1000);
    return intervalkey;
  }
};
</script>

<script>// Fandango Redesign Responsive Adhesive Ads
mps.__setResponsiveAds = function() {
  ADHESIVESLOT='boxaddt'; ADHESIVESLOTB='boxadone'; ADHESIVESLOTC='boxad'; ADHESIVEBREAK='tablet'; ADHESIVECLASS='ad-adhesive';

  if(typeof(mps)=='object' && typeof(mps.responsiveslots)=='object' && typeof(mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset])=='object' && typeof(mps._ready)=='function' && typeof(mps.selectAd)=='function' && typeof(mps.getResponsiveSet)=='function' && typeof(mps.slotsdisabled)=='object') {
      mps._ready(function() {
        var armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];
        var aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
        if(aslot==false && typeof(ADHESIVESLOTB)=='string') {
          ADHESIVESLOT = ADHESIVESLOTB;
          armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];

        }
        if(aslot==false && (mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOTB))==false && typeof(ADHESIVESLOTC)=='string') {
          ADHESIVESLOT = ADHESIVESLOTC;
          armap = mps.responsiveslots[mps._loadset][ADHESIVESLOT];
          aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
        }
        if(aslot && mps.getResponsiveSet()=='tablet' && typeof(armap)=='object' && typeof(mps.slotsdisabled['boxaddt'])=='undefined') {
          if(typeof(aslot)=='object') { // Everything looks good
            debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:component:Responsive] Applying adhesive class to '+ADHESIVESLOT+' ('+ADHESIVECLASS+')');
            mps._classAdd(aslot,ADHESIVECLASS);
            // close button
            var closeButton = document.createElement('i');
            var adIframeWidth = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(aslot.querySelector('iframe')).width);
            closeButton.className = 'icon icon-close mps-close';
            closeButton.style.cssText = 'display: block; margin-right: -' + (adIframeWidth / 2 + 12) + 'px;';
            aslot.insertBefore(closeButton, aslot.firstChild);
            closeButton.addEventListener('click', function(){
              closeButton.closest('.ad-adhesive').style.display = 'none';
            });
            // close button
            typeof(mps._elapsed)=='function' && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:component:Responsive] EXECUTED __setResponsiveAds ('+ADHESIVEBREAK+') '+ADHESIVESLOT+' .'+ADHESIVECLASS+' '+mps._elapsed());
          }
        } else {
          var aslot = mps.selectAd(ADHESIVESLOT);
          if(typeof(aslot)=='object') {
            mps._classRemove(aslot,ADHESIVECLASS);
          }
        }
      });
      return true;
  } else {
    debugmode.log && console.log ('[mps:component:Responsive] Responsive not enabled or MPS not fully loaded.');
    return false;
  }
};
mps.__setResponsiveAds();

mps._scaleAd = function (adslot,forceratio) {
  mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] Called Custom mps._scaleAd: '+adslot);
  var scaleclass = 'mps-has-scaled',
    adslot = adslot,
    aiframe = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]+' iframe'),
    adivgpt = mps._select('#'+mps.adslots[adslot]);
  var _viewport = mps._viewport();
  var adwidth = aiframe.clientWidth;
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] INITIAL AD WIDTH: ',adwidth)
  // Get width from adload if no iframe width
  if(!aiframe.clientWidth && mps._adloads && mps._adloads[mps._loadset] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'] && mps._adloads[mps._loadset][adslot]['size'][0]) {

  }
//console.debug('****[mps:SCALING] VIEWPORT WIDTH: '+_viewport)
  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && _viewport[0] < adwidth) {

  if(typeof(aiframe)==='object' && typeof(_viewport)==='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate)=='object' && typeof(mps.__prescalestate[adslot])=='object') {
    aiframe.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].iframe);
    adivgpt.setAttribute('style',mps.__prescalestate[adslot].div);
    delete mps.__prescalestate[adslot];
    mps._classRemove(adivgpt,scaleclass);
    
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscaled '+mps._elapsed());
  } else {
    mps._d('[mps:scaleAd] /'+adslot+'/ Unscale FAILED '+mps._elapsed());
  }
}
</script>


<!--{@bodyheader} fandango-floodlight2-core-ccpa: Fandango Floodlight2 Handler (gtag) (ccpa)-->
<script>//--[2020-08-18] New Fandango Floodlight Execution (gtag)
if((typeof OptanonActiveGroups !== 'undefined') || (mps._ck && mps._ck.r('OptanonConsent'))){ 
	var OptanonActiveGroups = OptanonActiveGroups || '';
	window.console && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] OptanonActiveGroups loaded FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO'); 
	
	//reformat cmpid for cookies group format
	let cmp_id = ',USP,';
	let cmp_id_num = cmp_id.replace(/,/g, '');
	let optanonCookie = mps._ck.r('OptanonConsent') || '';
	let cmpRegex = 'groups=[^&]*%2C'+cmp_id_num+'%3A1';
	
	if(OptanonActiveGroups.match(cmp_id ) || optanonCookie.match(cmpRegex)){


      mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=loaded-core');
      /* @TODO support app - times */
      mps.fandango=mps.fandango||{};
      mps.fandango.fltags=mps.fandango.fltags||[];
      mps.fandango.addFloodlight2 = function(targettype, platform, mvid, flsendto) {

        mps._d('[mps:FL2] addFloodlight2 called: ' + targettype + ' : ' + platform + ' : ' + mvid + ' : ' + flsendto);

        //TEST IF FLOODLIGHT SHOULD FIRE ON PAGE
        var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
        var pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
        var pathsforfloodlight = ['movie-times','movie-overview','TicketOrderConfirmationPage.aspx', 'UserConfirmation.aspx'];
        if(pathsforfloodlight.indexOf(pagemvid) == -1){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight not found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pathsforfloodlight was found. pagemvid: ' + pagemvid);
        }

        // STANDARDIZE VALUES
        if(!targettype || !platform || !mvid || !flsendto) return false;
        if(targettype.indexOf('ticket')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('conf')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('tc')>-1) targettype = 'ticket';
        if(targettype.indexOf('movie')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('overview')>-1 || targettype.indexOf('mop')>-1) targettype = 'movie';
        if(targettype.indexOf('time')>-1) targettype = 'times';
        if(platform=='app' && targettype=='ticket') return false;
        // DETERMINE PLATFORM THEN CHECK 
        if(platform.indexOf('app')>-1) platform='app';
        if(platform.indexOf('desktop')>-1 || platform=='web'  || platform=='dweb') platform = 'dweb';
        if(platform.indexOf('mobile')>-1 || platform=='mweb') platform = 'mweb';
        if(platform=='dweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-web') return false;
        if(platform=='mweb' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-mobile') return false;
        if(platform=='app' && mps.pagevars.instance!='fandango-apps') return false
        // DETERMINE PAGE TYPE THEN CHECK 
        var pagetype;
        if(typeof(mps.pagevars.cats)!='object') return false;
        if(mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('movie_detail')>-1 || mps.pagevars.cats.indexOf('moviepage')>-1 || JSON.stringify(mps.pagevars.cats)=='["androidmovies","detail"]') pagetype='movie';
        if(mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase_confirmation' || mps.pagevars.cats[0]=='purchase') pagetype = 'ticket';
        if(mps.pagevars.type=='movielisting' || mps.pagevars.type=='msp') pagetype = 'times';
        if(!pagetype || targettype!=pagetype) {
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] pagetype targettype match: ' + pagetype + ' : ' + targettype);
        }
        // DETERMINE PAGE MV ID THEN CHECK 
        var pagemvid;
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.movieid) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.movieid[0];
        if(mps.pagevars.cags && mps.pagevars.cags.mv) pagemvid = mps.pagevars.cags.mv[0];
        if(!pagemvid && mps.pagevars.instance=='fandango-apps' && mps.pagevars.path.indexOf('movies/detail')>-1) {
          var pathsegs = mps._trim(mps.pagevars.path,'/').split('/');
          if(/^\d+$/.test(pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1])) {
            pagemvid = pathsegs[pathsegs.length-1].toString();
          }
        }
        if(!pagemvid || mvid!=pagemvid){
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid nomatch: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
          return false;
        } else {
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] mvid pagemvid match: ' + mvid + ' : ' + pagemvid);
        }
        mps._l('[mps:FL2] Adding floodlight tag ('+targettype+', '+platform+', '+mvid+') '+flsendto)
        return mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2(flsendto);
      }
      mps.fandango.executeFloodlight2 = function(sendto,dcmflid) {
        mps._d('[mps:FL2] executeFloodlight2 called: ' + sendto + ' : ' + dcmflid );
        mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=call-executeFloodlight2');
        if(typeof(sendto)!='string') return false;
        if(!dcmflid) var dcmflid = sendto.split('/')[0];
        if(!mps.fandango._gtagload) {
          var gtagurl = 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id='+dcmflid;
          mps._d('[mps:FL2] Loading Script '+gtagurl);
          mps._append('body','<scr'+'ipt async src="'+gtagurl+'"></scr'+'ipt><scr'+'ipt>window.dataLayer=window.dataLayer||[];function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments)}gtag("js",new Date);</scr'+'ipt>');
          mps.fandango._gtagload = 1;
        }
        mps._d('[mps:FL2] DCM Floodlight Config ID: '+dcmflid+' - Send To: '+sendto);
        gtag('config',dcmflid);
        gtag('event','conversion',{
          'allow_custom_scripts': true,
          'send_to': sendto
        });
        mps._loadJS('http://app.mps.vsnt.net/request/component/global?name=x.js&x=gtag-event');
        return true;
      }
      mps._d('[mps:FL2] Handler Core Loaded');
    console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] component loads FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO'); 
	} else { 
		console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] component doesnt load no match FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO ' + cmp_id); 
	}
	
	} else {
	
	window.console && debugmode.log && console.log('[mps:CMP:hard] OptanonActiveGroups not loaded FLOODLIGHT2 FANDANGO');
	
	}
</script>

<!--{@bodyfooter}adRefresh30: adRefresh30-->
<script>
mps.refreshAdsInterval = function (slotname,intervalkey) {
  if(slotname === false) {
    return false;
  }
  intervalsecs = 30;
  mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window has focus, refresh ads. : "+ slotname);
  mps.refreshintervals = mps.refreshintervals || {};
  var intervalkey = intervalkey || (mps._keys(mps.refreshintervals).length + 1);
  if(intervalsecs > 0) {
    mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Set ad refresh interval for '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
    mps.refreshintervals[intervalkey] = setInterval(function(){
      mps._debug('[mps:Refresh] component Reached '+intervalsecs+'s ('+intervalsecs*1000 + 'ms) interval - Refreshing ad slots [interval key: '+intervalkey+']');
      // Detected display active refresh enabled.
      if(mps._bool(mpsopts.activerefresh) === true || mpsopts.activerefresh > 0) {
        // Check if window has focus.
        if(mps._activerefresh._focus === true ) {
            mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad. adslots is : "+ slotname +" : "+ mps._advars[mps._loadset][slotname]);
            var adelem = '#'+mps._adslots[mps._loadset][slotname];
            if( mps.inViewport(adelem,false) ) {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad IS in view. "+ slotname);
                mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
            } else {
                mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component refresh ad NOT in view. "+ slotname);
            }
        } else {
          mps._debug("[mps:Refresh]: component window doesn't have focus, or ad not in viewport, don't refresh ads.");
        }
      } else {
        mps.refreshAds(slotname,mps._loadset);
      }
    }, intervalsecs*1000);
    return intervalkey;
  }
};
</script>
<script>
mps._refreshslots = ['boxaddt'];
if( typeof(mps.refreshAdsInterval) == 'function' ){
    mps._refreshslots.forEach(mps.refreshAdsInterval);
}else{
    window.console && console.log('[mps:refresh:component] refreshAdsInterval not function '+ mps._refreshslots.toString());
}
</script>
<script>typeof mps._postscribe == "object" && mps._postscribe.disable();</script>

DomainData.MainText: Notice of Right to Opt-Out of Sale/Sharing and Targeted Advertising
DomainData.MainInfoText:
We may collect personal data from and about you through this site for “targeted advertising,” “selling,” or “sharing,” as defined by applicable privacy laws. Some states provide residents (or their authorized agents) with the right to opt out of these practices. See the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy for more info.

If you reside in one of these states (or are an authorized agent) you can opt out of targeted advertising, selling, or sharing, occurring on this site by moving the toggle below to the left and clicking “Confirm My Choice.” Your choice through the toggle is specific to this site. If you access other Versant sites and services, you will need to opt out for each. Also, if you clear your cookies on this browser or use another browser or device, you will need to opt out again. You can change your choice any time.

In addition to the toggle, you should also provide the information requested in our “Opt-Out Form” (accessible by clicking the “+” below), which will enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just on this site (e.g., we will be able to stop sharing your email with third parties in order to target you with adverting on other site and services, such as social media platforms).

You may also enable where available and provided for under applicable privacy laws, a universal tool that automatically communicates your opt out preference, such as the Global Privacy Control (“GPC”). If detected, we will process your GPC signal as if you had opted out through the toggle.

If you opt-out, you may continue to see advertising, including ads that may be based on personal information processed before you opted out.
DomainData.AlertNoticeText:
This site is now part of Versant. By continuing, you agree to our Terms. You also acknowledge that our updated Privacy Policy applies, including your existing data. For info on your data rights, click “Your Privacy Choices” or see “Your Rights” in our Privacy Policy.

We and our partners also use tools on this site to provide the services, personalize your experience, and for analytics, marketing, and advertising. If you previously opted out of selling, sharing, or targeted advertising on this site, you will need to update your Privacy Choice.

Those cookies are set by us and called first-party cookies. We also use third-party cookies – which are cookies from a domain different than the domain of the website you are visiting – for our advertising and marketing efforts. More specifically, we use cookies and other tracking technologies for the following purposes:

The cookie has a normal lifespan of one year, so that returning visitors to the site will have their preferences remembered. It contains no information that can identify the site visitor.

DomainData.PCenterVendorListNonCookieUsage: This vendor utilizes other methods of storage or accessing information in addition to cookies.
DomainData.PCOpensCookiesDetailsAlert: Cookie Details button opens Cookie List menu
DomainData.PCOpensVendorDetailsAlert: IAB Vendor Details button opens Vendor List menu
DomainData.AriaDescribedBy: Processing is required, choice is always enabled.
DomainData.BCookiePolicyLinkScreenReader: More information about your privacy, opens in a new tab
DomainData.PCenterVendorListScreenReader: Vendor Details button opens Vendor List menu
DomainData.BImprintLinkScreenReader: Legal Information, opens in a new tab
DomainData.PCOptOutSignalText:
Residents (or authorized agents) of states listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy: You are opted out of targeted advertising, selling, or sharing, occurring on this site, for this browser and device. We received your election through our toggle or a universal opt-out preference signal. You can change your choice any time.
You should also provide the information requested in this Opt-Out Form, which will enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just this site (e.g., we will be able to stop sharing your email with third parties in order to target you with adverting on other sites and services, like social media platforms, such as social media platforms).
Residents (or authorized agents) of states not listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy: If we do not detect that you are in one of the states listed in the “Your Rights” section of our Privacy Policy, we cannot ensure that we will be able to apply your opt out choice, even if you utilize the toggle or we receive your election through your universal opt-out preference signal.
DomainData.PCOptOutSignalTextAfterConsent: Your Opt Out Preference Signal Was Honored
DomainData.PCTechDetailsAriaLabel: Technologies List button opens Tracking Tech list menu
DomainData.PCVendorsCountSpcFeatureText: [VENDOR_NUMBER] partners can use this special feature
DomainData.PCVendorsCountSpcPurposeText: [VENDOR_NUMBER] partners can use this special purpose
DomainData.PCRequireSignatureHeaderDesc: Additional consent authorization is needed for the following reason:
DomainData.PCRequireSignatureHelpText: This field is required to consent to this category.
DomainData.GPCOptOutNoteText: Opted out due to GPC signal.
DomainData.DNTOptOutNoteText: Opted out due to DNT signal.
DomainData.ATTOptOutNoteText: Opted out due to ATT signal.
